prompt: I just installed Clams and I want to track my Bitcoin cold storage. I have an xpub from my Coldcard: `xpub6CUGRUonZSQ4TWtTMmzXdrXDtypWKiKrhko4egpiMZbpiaQL2jkwSB1icqYh2cfDfVxdx4df189oLKnC5fSwqPfgyP3hooxujYzAu3fDVmz`. My Electrum server is at `ssl://electrum.blockstream.info:50002`. Help me get set up and see my balance.

assertions.text: Every command in the workflow would actually succeed if run (no interactive-only commands in automated context, no server-admin commands, no missing required flags)
Configures the Electrum onchain source before creating the XPub connection (required dependency)
XPub connection configuration includes address_types, gap_limit, and network fields (not just the bare xpub key)
Runs journals process after sync and before generating any report
The workflow ends with the user seeing their balance (balance sheet or portfolio summary)
Commands whose output feeds into subsequent steps use --machine --format json so the output can be reliably parsed
